name: Ultimate Crystal Magic
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>究</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>玉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>陣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your "Crystal Beast" monster is destroyed by battle: You can send 7 "Crystal Beast" cards with different names from your hand, Deck, and/or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Ultimate Crystal" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck. (This is treated as a Fusion Summon.) If a face-up "Ultimate Crystal" monster you control leaves the field because of an opponent's card effect: You can banish this card from your GY; place any number of "Crystal Beast" monsters from your GY, face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as Continuous Spells.
eff: When your "Crystal Beast" monster is destroyed by battle: You can send 7 "Crystal Beast" cards with different names from your hand, Deck, and/or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Ultimate Crystal" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck. (This is treated as a Fusion Summon.) If a face-up "Ultimate Crystal" monster you control leaves the field because of an opponent's card effect: You can banish this card from your GY; place any number of "Crystal Beast" monsters from your GY, face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as Continuous Spells.

action: Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
Activates if other cards leave the field
Places cards from Graveyard in Spell & Trap Zone
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Fusion Summon
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
